1.title: Mexican and Colombian Cartel Alliance Network
1.short: A dense network of Mexican and Colombian cartels, paramilitaries, and street gangs cooperating in drug trafficking and shifting alliances.

2.title: Global Jihadist Network and Allies
2.short: A global jihadist network uniting al-Qaeda, Taliban, and allied militant groups across Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.

6.title: Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Clans Network
6.short: A network of Calabrian 'Ndrangheta clans cooperating in international drug trafficking, money laundering, and extortion across Europe and beyond.
